tasks.label: Build wifi-uart-bridge
tasks.command: source ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate && source ${workspaceFolder}/zephyr/zephyr-env.sh && west build -b esp32c3_supermini ${workspaceFolder}/applications/wifi-uart-bridge -p auto
tasks.detail: Build wifi-uart-bridge for esp32c3_supermini using west

tasks.label: Build esp32c3-supermini-uart0
tasks.command: source ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate && source ${workspaceFolder}/zephyr/zephyr-env.sh && west build -b esp32c3_supermini ${workspaceFolder}/applications/esp32c3_supermini-uart0 -p auto
tasks.detail: Build esp32c3_supermini-uart0 for esp32c3_supermini using west

background.beginsPattern: ^Info : Listening on port \d+ for gdb connections
